channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: DOGE was tasked with stopping Treasury payments to USAID, AP sources say
item.description: Officials working with Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency sought access to the U.S. Department of Treasury payment system to stop money from flowing to the U.S. Agency for International Development, according to two people familiar with the matter.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: 2nd federal judge in 2 days blocks Trump's birthright citizenship order
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — A second federal judge in two days has blocked President Donald Trump’s effort to end birthright citizenship for the children of parents who are in the U.S. illegally, decrying what he described as the administration's attempt to ignore the Constitution for political gain. U.S.
item.dc:creator: GENE JOHNSON and MIKE CATALINI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A short honeymoon for Catholics in D.C. as Vice President Vance clashes with bishops on migration
item.description: The sense of Catholic unity didn’t last long. Less than a week after Vice President JD Vance shared the inauguration stage with a senior Catholic cardinal, Vance picked a fight with the top American leaders of his church. The new vice president, a Catholic convert, accused the U.S.
item.dc:creator: PETER SMITH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Minnesota Supreme Court hears arguments on House conflict despite GOP, DFL agreement
item.description: The Minnesota Supreme Court heard oral arguments Thursday morning in a case involving a standoff in the Minnesota House that has dragged on for more than three weeks, though GOP and DFL leaders had reached an agreement Wednesday night to resolve the conflict.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: US seizes Venezuelan president's plane held in Dominican Republic during Rubio visit
item.description: The Trump administration has seized the second of two planes belonging to Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro's government that is currently in the Dominican Republic.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Lee, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Musk says DOGE will make 'rapid safety upgrades' to air traffic control system
item.description: "With the support of President @realDonaldTrump, the @DOGE team will aim to make rapid safety upgrades to the air traffic control system," Musk wrote Wednesday on the social platform X.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, NewsNation

item.title: Democrats accuse DOGE of going after NOAA
item.description: Democratic lawmakers on Wednesday accused Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) of improperly inserting itself into the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA). In a joint statement, Reps. Zoe Lofgren (D-Calif.) and Jared Huffman (D-Calif.
item.dc:creator: Zack Budryk, NewsNation

item.title: Trump unleashes a supercharged MAGA agenda and Republicans come aboard
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — President Donald Trump is testing how far Republicans are willing to go in supporting his supercharged “Make America Great Again” agenda, tearing down government agencies and taking actions fundamentally at odds with once-traditional party principles.
item.dc:creator: JILL COLVIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Democratic senators protest after they say Trump gives Musk's staff access to classified info
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Democrats on the Senate Intelligence Committee are demanding answers after they say President Donald Trump gave billionaire Elon Musk and his staff access to sensitive data and classified secrets as part of their work to overhaul the federal government.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: DOGE actions 'long overdue, much welcomed': House speaker
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson is defending the Elon Musk-led DOGE, saying the government needs to spend money better.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Justice Dept. official accuses FBI chief of 'insubordination,' tamps down talk of revenge on agents
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A top Justice Department official accused the FBI's acting leaders of “insubordination” in a Wednesday memo in which he sought to soothe anxiety inside the bureau over the potential for a broad purge of agents involved in investigating the Jan. 6 riot at the U.S. Capitol.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER and ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texas Dem says he’ll bring articles of impeachment against Trump over Gaza
item.description: “The movement to impeach the president has begun,” Texas Democratic Rep. Al Green said on the House floor.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Mahomes reveals thoughts on Trump attending the Super Bowl
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs quarterback Patrick Mahomes was asked what it will feel like to play in front of a sitting president.
item.dc:creator: Geoff Petrulis, NewsNation

item.title: Trump oil tariffs expected to raise price at the pump
item.description: President Trump’s tariff on Canadian oil is expected to raise prices at the pump for U.S. consumers, if it takes effect as planned after a 30-day delay.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, Fox 5

item.title: Trump wants rare earth elements from Ukraine in exchange for military aid
item.description: “We're looking to do a deal with Ukraine, where they're going to secure what we're giving them with their rare earth and other things,” he told reporters.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, Fox 5

item.title: Florida immigration bill, marijuana petition spark debate
item.description: The battle between Gov. Ron DeSantis and state GOP lawmakers has become more public and continues to heat up.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Air traffic controllers union responds to Trump's DEI attacks
item.description: The air traffic controllers union responded Friday to claims by President Trump this week that diversity programs contributed to the fatal crash in Washington Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Giorno, Fox 5

item.title: How non-violent undocumented immigrants could be swept up in raids
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – In two weeks of the second Trump administration, the White House is staying true to tough immigration policies with ICE raids across the country. Several have happened in the tri-state area.
item.dc:creator: Dan Mannarino, PIX 11
